title: Enchantable Mending
description: This plugin introduces a gameplay enhancement by making the Mending enchantment available through the enchantment table.
body:
This plugin introduces a gameplay enhancement by making the Mending enchantment available through the enchantment table. Typically, Mending is obtained through gameplay mechanics like fishing, trading with villagers, or finding it as loot. However, this plugin modifies the enchantment table mechanics, allowing players to acquire the coveted Mending enchantment through the same process used for other enchantments.

Customization Options:

  • Enchantment Probability: Adjust the likelihood of getting Mending from the enchantment table to match server rarity preferences.
  • Infinity Compatibility: Enable or disable combining Mending with Infinity.
  • Max Enchantment Level: Decide whether Mending is restricted to highest-level enchantments (Level 30).
